# Jira & PR Rules

## Jira
- Every task must be mapped to a Jira ticket.
- Format: `[PROJ-123] - Short Description`
- Status updates must be logged at stages: 1, 5, and 11.

## PR Quality
- Max 500 lines changed per PR.
- Must include test evidence summary.
- Must include a "How to test" section.
- Lint/Format must pass 100%.
